utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: What ? I ... I bought groceries , I was gonna make you dinner !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well next time ask ! Or at least wait for me to ask !

utterances.speaker: The Museum Official
utterances.text: Hi , this is Heldi from the Morgan Chase museum . I am calling for Monica Geller .

utterances.speaker: The Museum Official
utterances.text: I want to let her know that there was a cancellation and if she is still interested in having the Bing ... Geller wedding at our facility , it is available

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Oh please , he did not hear it ! He did not hear it ! !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: This is Chandler Bing ! This is Chandler Bing !
